mapper.select: select tnum, TO_CHAR(tdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as tdate, description from todo where tid = #{tid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo(tnum, tid, tdate, description) VALUES(todo_num_seq.NEXTVAL,#{tid},TO_DATE(#{tdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{description})
mapper.update: update todo set description = #{description} where tnum = #{tnum}
mapper.select:
SELECT tnum,tid, TO_CHAR(tdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as tdate, description from todo WHERE tid IN
#{item}
